step_rationale: Pyroptosis effector; inflammatory pathway activation during MI ischemia-reperfusion.
mechanism: Gasdermin D mediates pyroptotic cardiomyocyte death and inflammatory cytokine release during acute myocardial infarction.

references.title: Metagenomic Sequencing Combined with Metabolomics to Explore Gut Microbiota and Metabolic Changes in Mice with Acute Myocardial Infarction and the Potential Mechanism of Allicin.
